chunks.text: PM Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY): Zero balance savings account for unbanked. Overdraft facility up to ₹10,000. Free RuPay debit card with ₹2L accidental insurance. Life cover ₹30,000 for accounts opened before Jan 26, 2015. PMJJBY (₹330/yr, ₹2L life) and PMSBY (₹20/yr, ₹2L accidental) linked. Access: all bank branches and BCs. Over 50 crore accounts opened.

Atal Pension Yojana (APY): For unorganised sector workers, age 18-40. Fixed pension ₹1,000 to ₹5,000/month at 60. Contribution based on joining age — younger = less contribution. Example: ₹5,000 pension at age 18: ₹210/month. At age 30: ₹577/month. Government co-contribution: 50% of contribution or ₹1,000/yr (whichever lower) for 5 years — for those who joined before Dec 2015 and not income tax payers. Nominee gets corpus on death.

PM Mudra Yojana (PMMY): Loans for micro/small businesses without collateral. Three tiers — Shishu: up to ₹50,000. Kishor: ₹50,001 to ₹5,00,000. Tarun: ₹5,00,001 to ₹10,00,000. No processing fee for Shishu. Available at all banks, NBFCs, MFIs. No minimum CIBIL required for Shishu. Targeted at first-generation entrepreneurs, SC/ST, women.

EPFO Schemes: EPF — 12% employee + 12% employer contribution. EPS — 8.33% of employer share (max ₹1,250/month). EDLI — employer 0.5% for life insurance up to ₹7L. Advance from EPF allowed for: house purchase (90%), marriage (50%), medical (6x salary), COVID (75% or 3 months). EPFO Universal Account Number (UAN) — one number for life across all employers. Activate at unifiedportal-mem.epfindia.gov.in.

PM Kisan Samman Nidhi: ₹6,000/year in 3 instalments of ₹2,000 for small/marginal farmers (land ≤ 2 hectares). Direct benefit transfer to Aadhaar-linked bank account. Register at pmkisan.gov.in. Not taxable. State governments may provide additional top-up. Beneficiaries: over 11 crore farmers enrolled.

Ayushman Bharat (PMJAY): World's largest health insurance scheme. Coverage: ₹5,00,000/year per family for secondary and tertiary hospitalisation. Targeted at bottom 40% of population by SECC database. Cashless treatment at 25,000+ empanelled hospitals. Covers pre-existing conditions from day 1. No premium for beneficiaries. Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in with mobile number.

NPS (National Pension System) — Government: Mandatory for central govt employees joining after 2004. State govts also enrolled. Tier 1 mandatory — 10% employee + 14% employer contribution (central govt). At 60: 40% minimum annuity. Tax benefit: 80CCD(1) within ₹1.5L, 80CCD(1B) additional ₹50,000, 80CCD(2) employer contribution additional. PFRDA (Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority) regulates.

Senior Citizen Schemes: SCSS (Senior Citizen Savings Scheme) — 8.2% p.a., max ₹30L deposit, quarterly payout, 5-year tenure (extendable by 3 years), 80C eligible. PMVVY (Pradhan Mantri Vaya Vandana Yojana) — LIC managed, 7.4% assured pension, max ₹15L, 10-year policy, monthly/quarterly/annual payout. Both for 60+ (55+ for retired govt/VRS). SCSS at post office or SBI/designated banks.

Startup India Scheme: DPIIT-recognised startups get 3-year income tax holiday (u/s 80IAC). Capital gains exemption if invested in eligible startups. Angel tax (Section 56) exemption for DPIIT-recognised startups. Self-certification for 9 labour and environment laws. Fast-track patent application with 80% fee reduction. Fund of Funds: ₹10,000 Cr for SEBI-registered AIFs investing in startups. Register at startupindia.gov.in.
